description_long: This information point features a striking circular structure at its center, constructed from translucent blue material, possibly glass or acrylic, with a stepped, tiered design. The base is an angular, geometric platform with a patterned surface, likely made from concrete or stone, and includes a mix of sloped and flat areas. The platform is bordered by sharp, triangular extensions and contains a small green landscaped section, suggesting integration with urban greenery. The overall form is highly modern, with a focus on bold lines and contrasting textures. The central circular element likely serves as the main information hub, possibly housing digital displays or interactive panels. The structure is large and imposing, designed to be a focal point in a public space such as a plaza or park.
description: A large, modern information point with a translucent blue circular hub atop a geometric, patterned platform, featuring angular extensions and a landscaped section.
description_view_0: The circular blue hub and patterned platform are prominent, with the landscaped section visible at the right rear and sharp triangular extensions at the left.
description_view_1: The view highlights the angular geometry of the base and the integration of the green landscaped area, with the blue hub offset to the right.
description_view_2: The stepped, translucent blue hub dominates the foreground, while the patterned platform and green section are visible in the background.
description_view_3: The angular extensions and the full length of the patterned platform are visible, with the blue hub positioned to the left and the landscaped area at the far end.
attribute_facade_detailing: The facade features a bold geometric pattern with alternating light and dark segments, and the central hub is defined by concentric translucent blue bands. Minimalist landscaping and sharp, angular extensions add visual interest and contrast.
